title: The Example Ladder
instructions:
Build a sentiment classifier prompt. Start with zero-shot, then add 1, 3, and 5 examples. Each tier will be tested against 20 items. Goal: achieve the highest accuracy across all tiers.

Rules:
1. Your prompt must classify each input as exactly one of: positive, negative, or neutral
2. Return ONLY the label — no explanation, no punctuation, no extra text
3. For each tier, you submit a single prompt template. The test input will be appended to your prompt.
4. Observe how accuracy changes as you add more examples.

Tips:
- Choose diverse examples that cover different types of positive, negative, and neutral statements
- Include at least one tricky case (sarcasm, backhanded compliment) in your few-shot examples
- Keep your formatting consistent across all examples
